calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-26-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANTS DANIEL LUCERO AND CHRISSY MOORE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained with 5 days leave to amend. No opposition was filed. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 = (301/EHG)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-21-2011 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Michael Begert; Clerk: sravinantapricha ; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff B. D. Thakor, is present.
Plaintiff is in pro per.
Defendants, Daniel Lucero, Chrissy Moore and K. Miranda are present.
Attorney, Anne Epperly, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem David May, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502b, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of SEP-26-2011 is vacated.
